description.value:
Used as a replacement for skills rolled with base COOL, EMP, or WILL

Used for rolling in checks which involve force of will, charisma, general intelligence, or intution. Note that if the check is specialized and the mook is not, the DV should be raised 1-3 tiers.

Used as a replacement for fighting or ranged weapon skills, excluding evasion. Note that this uses REF as a base for reasons involving initiative - set REF of the mook first, then consider that number when considering the Martial skill.
Used as a replacement for skills which rely on base Body or Dex, which are not covered by the Martial skill, and for Evasion.
Used for skills which rely on base INT or TECH.
Can be applied to all vehicles. Armors the vehicle to SP13. Doesn't affect the glass.
Can be applied to all vehicles except Bikes, Jetskis and Gyrocopters. Adds 20 SDP to the vehicle. This doesn't affect the glass, and vehicle can now tow up to 10 tons.
Can be applied to all vehicles. All glass on the vehicle is now considered cover with 15 HP. Can be taken a second time to upgrade to 30HP. All windows take damage individually.

Can be applied to all land and sea vehicles, except Bikes and Jetskies. When you ram something with the front of your vehicle, your vehicle doesn't take damage and nobody inside suffers from the Whiplash critical injury. You deal 2d6 additional ramming damage if your vehicle was boosted by NOS on the turn you ram the object.
Can be applied to all vehicles. All glass on the vehicle is now considered cover with 15 HP. Can be taken a second time to upgrade to 30HP. All windows take damage individually.

Rideable.SpawnRidersFlag: Thick Bulletproof Windshield;Armored Left Door;Armored Right Door;Armored Tire;Armored Tire;Armored Tire;Armored Tire;Armored Tire;Armored Tire;

information.notes:
Seats 2 in the cabin, 6 in the rear, with a secure pair of compartments near the front of the rear compartment for transporting the criminally accused. Like a patrol car, an onboard computer is present between the two front seats, allowing the vehicle to be driven autonomously. The vehicle has 3 axles with 2 tires each (1 in the front, 2 in the rear), an armored and heavy chassis, bulletproof glass, and a combat plow.

Cabin exits to its sides. Rear compartment exits from the rear.
